title: Toilet training concern
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.
examination.rationale: Supports child history and examination context for toilet training concern; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, readiness, daytime and night continence, stooling, urinary symptoms, routines, development, stressors, examination, assessment and plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for toilet training concern.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
